200.q: Who is the Straw Hats' doctor?
Who is the Straw Hats' archaeologist?
Who is the Straw Hats' shipwright?
Who is the Straw Hats' musician?
What dangerous sea holds the One Piece?
What are mysterious fruits that grant powers called?
What title is given to the four strongest pirates?
What ship do the Straw Hats use after the Going Merry?
What is the lost century called?
What stones record the ancient history?
What island lies at the end of the Grand Line?
What hidden true model is Luffy's fruit?
200.a: Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika

200.q: What is the World Government's hidden ruler called?
Who inspired Luffy by giving him the straw hat?
What is Zoro's dream?
200.a: To become the world's greatest swordsman

200.q: What fruit gives Luffy his rubber powers in the live-action show?
Which swordsman joins Luffy first?
Which chef joins the crew from the Baratie?
What is Luffy's favorite food?
What is the name of Luffy's crew?
Who is Monkey D. Luffy?
200.a: The captain of the Straw Hat Pirates — his dream is to find the One Piece and become King of the Pirates

200.q: What did Luffy eat?
200.a: The Gomu Gomu no Mi — making his body rubber

200.q: Who is Roronoa Zoro?
200.a: The swordsman of the crew — he uses three swords and aims to be the world's greatest swordsman

200.q: What is the One Piece?
200.a: The legendary treasure left by the Pirate King Gol D. Roger — its true nature is revealed in late arcs

200.q: Who is Nami?
200.a: The navigator of the Straw Hat Pirates — she can predict weather and uses a clima-tact

200.q: Who created One Piece?
200.a: Eiichiro Oda — one of the best-selling manga authors in history

200.q: What is the Grand Line?
200.a: The dangerous ocean where the most powerful pirates operate — where the One Piece is hidden

200.q: Who is Shanks?
200.a: A legendary Yonko pirate — he inspired Luffy and gave him his straw hat

200.q: What are Devil Fruits?
200.a: Mysterious fruits that grant powers but take away the ability to swim — three types: Paramecia, Zoan, Logia

200.q: Who is Tony Tony Chopper?
200.a: The crew's doctor — a reindeer who ate the Human-Human Devil Fruit

400.q: What power system has Observation, Armament, and Conqueror's forms?
What title is given to the world's four most powerful pirates?
Who can read the ancient Poneglyphs for the Straw Hats?
Who is Luffy's grandfather and legendary Marine hero?
What prison must be infiltrated to save Ace?
Who is the fleet admiral known as Akainu?
What village is Nami from?
Which marine hero is revealed as Luffy's grandfather?
Which clown pirate rules Orange Town?
What pirate inspires Luffy to set sail?
What sea does Sanji dream of finding?
What is Nami's role on the crew?
What fruit gives Luffy his rubber powers?
What body part defines Sanji's fighting style?
What chef owns the Baratie?
What is the Straw Hats' ship called?
What is Zoro's dream?
What is Usopp's father's name?
What Devil Fruit lets Buggy split apart?
What does Luffy's rubber body come from?
Who is the Straw Hats' cook?
What is Haki?
400.a: Spiritual energy all living beings have — three types: Observation, Armament, and Conqueror's

400.q: What is the Will of D?
400.a: A mystery connecting people with the initial D in their names — related to the Void Century and the ancient enemy of the World Government

400.q: Who are the Yonko?
400.a: The Four Emperors — the most powerful pirates in the world: Shanks, Kaido, Big Mom, and Blackbeard

400.q: What is the Void Century?
400.a: A 100-year period erased from world history — its truth would overturn the World Government

400.q: Who is Nico Robin?
400.a: The crew's archaeologist — the only person who can read Poneglyphs, the ancient stones holding history

400.q: What is the Straw Hat Crew's ship?
400.a: The Thousand Sunny — with a lion figurehead, built by Franky

400.q: What is Marineford?
400.a: The Marine headquarters — site of the Paramount War where Ace dies and the world order changes

400.q: Who is Portgas D. Ace?
400.a: Luffy's older brother — commander of Whitebeard's second division — he dies at Marineford

400.q: What is the Fishman Island arc about?
400.a: The crew arrives at the underwater kingdom — exploring racism, discrimination, and Arlong's legacy

400.q: Who is Dracule Mihawk?
400.a: The greatest swordsman in the world — Zoro's ultimate goal is to defeat him

600.q: What is the hidden true identity of Luffy's fruit?
600.a: The Hito Hito no Mi, Model: Nika

600.q: What is the final island at the end of the Grand Line called?
What erased 100-year period is central to the world's mystery?
What restaurant does Zeff run?
Who gifts the Going Merry to the Straw Hats?
Which fish-man terrorizes Nami's home?
What is Usopp's home village called?
What restaurant ship does Sanji work on?
What title does Mihawk hold?
What species is Arlong?
What does the Going Merry figurehead resemble?
What tyrant rules the Fish-Man area in East Blue?
What clown-faced pirate is one of Luffy's earliest enemies?
What map does Nami dream of drawing?
What marine officer chases the Straw Hats in the live action early on?
What food part does Sanji refuse to waste under Zeff's teachings?
What chef mentor loses a leg and trains Sanji?
What execution platform stands in Loguetown?
What pirate king's full name inspires Luffy?
What marine captain traps Zoro at Shells Town?
What marine officer trains under Garp in the live action?
What fighting style does Sanji use?
What sea where the story starts is called?
What title is given to the four most powerful pirates?
What is the true nature of the Gomu Gomu no Mi?
600.a: It is actually the Hito Hito no Mi: Mythical Zoan, Model: Nika — the Sun God fruit, suppressed by the World Government

600.q: What is the Sun God Nika?
600.a: An ancient figure who brought joy and freedom — the one who made people laugh. Luffy embodies this

600.q: What is Joy Boy?
600.a: An ancient figure from 800 years ago who promised to return — Luffy is the new Joy Boy

600.q: What is the Poneglyphs' secret?
600.a: Ancient stones inscribed with history the World Government wants suppressed — the Road Poneglyphs lead to Laugh Tale

600.q: What is Laugh Tale?
600.a: The island at the end of the Grand Line where Gol D. Roger found the One Piece and learned the truth

600.q: What is the significance of Gol D. Roger's execution?
600.a: Rather than crushing piracy, his final words about the One Piece sparked the Great Pirate Era

600.q: Who is Im?
600.a: The mysterious supreme ruler sitting on the Empty Throne — the true power behind the World Government

600.q: What is the Ancient Weapon Pluton?
600.a: A warship capable of destroying an island — its blueprints were given to Franky and he memorised and burned them

600.q: What is the Egghead arc's significance?
600.a: Vegapunk reveals the world's true history — and is killed for it, sending his message to the world

600.q: What is the significance of Shanks giving Luffy his hat?
600.a: It represents a promise — give it back when you become a great pirate. It defines Luffy's entire journey
